description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Spark can activate a new SPK token pre-launch token reward airdrop program to capture other growth opportunities.

The program can last until the moment SPK launches, or a shorter duration. When activated, the exact details of the special pre-launch token reward airdrop program must be specified in [A.6.1.1.1.3.2.2.2.1.1.0.6.1 - Special Pre-launch Token Reward Program Details](51316a6c-fd6a-4507-b99d-731e80fc9f76).

The SPK tokens for the future Spark Airdrop are allocated between all borrowers based on a formula announced by Spark and specified in the above cited document. The rate of SPK tokens being earned is 7,239,130 SPK per month, distributed on a per block basis proportional to the formula specified in the above cited document.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.

As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Spark can activate a new SPK token pre-launch token reward airdrop program to capture other growth opportunities.

The program can last until the moment SPK launches, or a shorter duration. When activated, the exact details of the special pre-launch token reward airdrop program must be specified in [A.6.1.1.1.3.2.2.2.1.1.0.6.1 - Special Pre-launch Token Reward Program Details](51316a6c-fd6a-4507-b99d-731e80fc9f76).

The SPK tokens for the future Spark Airdrop are allocated between all borrowers based on a formula announced by Spark and specified in the above cited document. The rate of SPK tokens being earned is 7,239,130 SPK per month, distributed on a per block basis proportional to the formula specified in the above cited document.
